channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cognition CEO says tech firms overemphasized token leaderboards, should focus on employee output
item.description: Scott Wu's concerns align with research showing AI saves time, but employees often struggle to convert those savings into productivity gains.

item.title: European Parliament members seek probe of FIFA president Infantino over Trump call before Balogun decision
item.description: "Once again, we've seen Infantino and FIFA surrender to the demands of the Trump administration," lawmakers said in a statement.

item.title: From factory worker to millionaire retiring at 32, this man still works and takes public transit three decades later
item.description: Bill Holland, former CEO of Canada's CI Financial, continues to use public transit, reflecting a frugal approach shared by Warren Buffett and Elon Musk.

item.title: AI startups prioritize elite male graduates over entry-level talent, study finds
item.description: New AI startups are increasingly hiring top male graduates from elite universities, bypassing less experienced workers.
